ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., surface, mountain, urban) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation of the weather station */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner of the weather station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, wind speed) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor collecting the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "week_day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount */,
  "q_v_2m" REAL /* QV2M metric value */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure */,
  "t_2m_min" REAL /* Minimum T2M value */,
  "ws_10m_max" REAL /* Maximum WS10M value */,
  "ws_50m_max" REAL /* Maximum WS50M value */,
  "ws_10m_min" REAL /* Minimum WS10M value */,
  "ws_50m_min" REAL /* Minimum WS50M value */,
  "t_2m_wet" REAL /* T2M wet value */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, missing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inflow_outflow_data" (
  "inflow_outflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inflow/outflow data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data record associated with the inflow/outflow data */,
  "present_storage_tmc" REAL /* Present storage TMC */,
  "reservoir_level_ft" REAL /* Reservoir level in feet */,
  "inflow_cusecs" INTEGER /* Inflow in CUSECS */,
  "outflow_cusecs" INTEGER /* Outflow in CUSECS */,
  "water_level" REAL /* Water level */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the water (e.g., good, bad, missing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inflow_outflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inflow_outflow_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., researcher, engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team performing the analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data record analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
